author: codex-duplicate-audit

patch.value: Single-source extension manifest and policy examples in docs

Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: docs/EXTENSIONS.md embeds extension manifest and policy examples that duplicate runnable example files. Manifest v2 provenance/sandbox/permissions/capabilities examples appear in docs/EXTENSIONS.md:145-170 and docs/examples/policy-restricted-extension/manifest.json:1-21 plus docs/examples/starter-extension/manifest.json:1-32; policy config examples appear in docs/EXTENSIONS.md:193-217 and docs/examples/policy-restricted-extension/README.md:26-59. Existing pm-w98k covers source-code extension contract constants and pm-axd1 covers production/test default objects, not docs/example snippet drift.

docs/EXTENSIONS.md either links to runnable example manifests/configs or embeds snippets generated/checked from those files; extension example docs no longer drift from runnable files; docs-skills gate and example/package checks pass.

message: Create duplicate-audit finding for extension docs examples

author: codex-dedupe-agent
message: Start docs dedupe for extension manifest/policy examples as part of combined single-source docs PR.

value.author: codex-docs-dedupe-lane
value.text: Evidence from docs/plugin single-source lane (read-only, 2026-05-25): docs/EXTENSIONS.md embeds a minimal extension layout, v1 manifest, v2 manifest, capabilities list, and extensions.policy JSON. Runnable example files provide the actual executable references: docs/examples/starter-extension/manifest.json declares all capabilities with sandbox_profile none and writable permissions; docs/examples/policy-restricted-extension/manifest.json declares commands/hooks/services with sandbox_profile restricted and read-only-ish permissions; docs/examples/policy-restricted-extension/README.md contains the richer enforce policy example including trusted_extensions, blocked_surfaces services.override, blocked_services output_format, and extension_overrides. Drift found: docs/EXTENSIONS.md policy snippet omits fields present in the runnable policy example (trusted_extensions, extension_overrides) and uses blocked_surfaces commands.override while the runnable example uses services.override; the v2 manifest snippet is illustrative but no longer matches either runnable manifest exactly. Recommendation: make docs/examples/starter-extension/manifest.json and docs/examples/policy-restricted-extension/* canonical for complete manifests/policy configs; keep docs/EXTENSIONS.md as API/reference with tiny illustrative snippets plus explicit links to runnable examples. Smallest edit: replace long v2 manifest/policy JSON in docs/EXTENSIONS.md with reduced excerpts or "see runnable example" links, and add a one-line rule that snippets are illustrative while example files are source of truth. Validation commands to wire: pnpm quality:docs-skills, pnpm build, pm contracts --schema-only --json, pm contracts --command extension --flags-only --json, and a sandbox install/doctor of starter + policy examples with isolated PM_PATH/PM_GLOBAL_PATH or node scripts/run-tests.mjs if an existing extension example test target is available.

patch.value: Completed in combined extension/plugin dedupe PR: canonicalized duplicated extension contract/default sources or routed duplicated plugin/docs inventory to one source. Evidence is recorded on the item and parent pm-rnpb; focused tests, docs/plugin checks, manual temp-project smoke, package dogfood, full release gate, changelog check, GitHub/dependency/security checks, and Sentry/telemetry checks passed.
